title: Conduct & Rules
description: Written and unwritten rules at the workplace

lessons.title: Chewing Gum & Perfume – Not Allowed in Production

sections.text: It has been observed that chewing gum and perfume are being used in production. This is not permitted in accordance with the company's hygiene rules.

sections.title: The following is strictly prohibited in production areas:

sections.text: All employees must comply with these rules without exception!

lessons.title: Important Hygiene Information – Wash Your Hands

sections.text: Hygiene deviations have been detected on the production lines. Wash your hands thoroughly. Follow the hygiene rules carefully.

sections.title: How to wash your hands correctly:

sections.text: Tests will be carried out in the airlock area next week.

sections.title: Your responsibility:
items: 🤝 Take responsibility – kindly remind your colleagues if you see rule violations
🐟 We produce food – QUALITY and HYGIENE ARE ESSENTIAL!
